t_ch: {F#她们}{M#他们}不止是我的同伴，也是我来时所经的路，引我至此。
t_en: They are more than just my companions. They are the path I took that led me to where I am now.

t_ch: 所以，{F#她们}{M#他们}也会成为我迷失时的路标，通向未来，直到下一个「轮回」。
t_en: So they will also be beacons for when I am lost, leading me to the future, until my next "reincarnation."

t_ch: 那就让我看看，你要如何贯彻这道信念吧。
t_en: Then let me see how you'll carry out your convictions.

t_ch: 不出所料，有人已恭候我们多时了。
t_en: As expected, someone's been waiting for us.

t_ch: 怎会是你……
t_en: It's you...?

t_ch: 他们到了……
t_en: They are here...

t_ch: 「不朽」的龙裔，还有…你昔日的战友。
t_en: A Scion of Permanence... and your old comrade-in-arms.

t_ch: 我的老友，荒笛…尽情享用吧。
t_en: Terravox, my old friend... Indulge yourself.

t_ch: 让这片忆潮，吞噬一切。
t_en: Let this memoria tide swallow everything.

t_ch: 丹恒阁下，该做好最坏的准备了：眼前这位山之民，绝不可小觑……
t_en: Be prepared for the worst, Lord Dan Heng. This Mountain Dweller must not be underestimated...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「开山者」吉奥刻勒斯…大地的龙骑士，好久不见。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Geocles the Mountainbreaker... Earth's Dromas Rider, it's been a while.</color>

t_ch: 「开山者」？他…不是荒笛？
t_en: "Mountainbreaker"? He's... not Terravox?

t_ch: 我记得你，鱼儿，还有你卑劣的主人。
t_en: I remember you, little fish, and your despicable master.

t_ch: 没想到，你还活着。
t_en: I didn't think you were still alive.

t_ch: 对于山之民，死亡只是回归大地。多亏了「长夜月」的恩赐……
t_en: Death is just a return to the Earth for Mountain Dwellers. Thanks to Evernight's gift...

t_ch: 我才能重返人间，守望我的挚友——那为逐火的阴谋白白牺牲的「大地」半神。
t_en: I was able to come back to the mortal realm and keep watch over my dear friend, the "Earth" demigod who was sacrificed to the Flame-Chase plot in vain.

t_ch: 龙裔，你是这场献祭中最重要的供物：再坚韧的意志也终将被忆潮吞没，届时，你，还有{RUBY_B#化龙妙法}你承载的力量{RUBY_E#}，便能为我等所有……
t_en: Long's Scion, you are the most important offering in this ritual sacrifice. No matter how strong your will is, it will eventually be swallowed by the memoria tide. When that time comes, you and {RUBY_B#Transmutation Arcanum}the powers you bear{RUBY_E#} will serve us...

t_ch: 用「不朽」唤起坠落的巨龙，令「大地」长出不灭的血肉！
t_en: We will use the Permanence to awaken the fallen Giant Dragon and give the "Earth" an everlasting body!

t_ch: 原来如此，你假称自己是荒笛……
t_en: I see. So you pretended to be Terravox...

t_ch: 是为了让我们追击至此，步入陷阱。
t_en: In order to lead us here into a trap.

t_ch: 如果没有凯撒可耻的诡计，「荒笛」之名——本该为我们共有。
t_en: If it weren't for the Imperator's tricks, the name "Terravox" would be shared between us anyway.

t_ch: 为了翁法罗斯的明天，它做出了正确的选择。
t_en: They made the right choice for Amphoreus's tomorrow.

t_ch: 但你们口中的明天，从来只有「人」的位置。
t_en: But the tomorrow you speak of only ever had a place for "humans."

t_ch: 老友啊，看吧……
t_en: Watch, my old friend...

t_ch: 我将再度扬起山火，烧毁那束缚你我的枷锁！
t_en: I will once again start a fire that burns away the chains that shackle us!

t_ch: 这里交给我吧，丹恒阁下。用那道<color=#dbc291ff>密径</color>到对岸去，{NICKNAME}或许就在更深处——
t_en: Why don't you leave this to me, Lord Dan Heng? Use that <color=#dbc291ff>Hidden Passage</color> to reach the opposite shore. Perhaps {NICKNAME} is there, deeper inside...

t_ch: 不，让我留在这里。
t_en: No, I will stay here.

t_ch: 「开山者」，山之民的英雄。若我不在这里得胜，他必将在「不朽」的妄执中丑陋死去。这不该是他的结局。
t_en: "Mountainbreaker," hero of the Mountain Dwellers. If I do not stay here and triumph over him, he will die an ugly death in delusions of the Permanence. That should not be his destiny.

t_ch: 而对于执意阻拦星穹列车，威胁世界命运的害兽……
t_en: And for the vicious beast that insists on obstructing the Astral Express and threatening the fate of the world...

t_ch: 这一路来，我们曾无数次站在悬崖边，被危难胁迫，做出艰难的选择。唯独这次——
t_en: We've stood on the precipice countless times along this journey, forced to make difficult choices in the face of disaster. But this time...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>该轮到我，向这个世界施压了。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>It's my turn to put some pressure on this world.</color>

t_ch: 该结束挣扎了，吉奥刻勒斯。你理应以尊严的姿态赴死。
t_en: It's time to stop struggling, Geocles. Go to your death with dignity.

t_ch: 在那之前，告诉我：你和「长夜月」做了什么交易，伟大的「开山者」为何会沦为这副模样？
t_en: Before that, tell me, what kind of deal did you make with Evernight? How was the great Mountainbreaker reduced to this?

t_ch: *哀伤的轰鸣*
t_en: *bereaved roar*

t_ch: 这是……
t_en: That's...

t_ch: 交给我吧。阐述「大地」至沉的过去……
t_en: Leave it to me. I'll recount the Earth's heaviest past...

t_ch: …断绝它至深的妄念。
t_en: ...And sever its deepest delusion.

t_ch: 荒笛…是你？
t_en: Terravox... Is that you?

t_ch: 你的身躯…竟变得如此瘦弱。
t_en: Your body... has become so frail.

t_ch: 群山也会老去，乃至死亡。
t_en: Even mountain ranges grow old and eventually die.

t_ch: 但我能听到，你的血脉中依旧回荡着澎湃的声响……
t_en: But I can hear the sound of blood still surging through your veins, fast and strong...

t_ch: 想必，你就是真正的「大地」半神。
t_en: I suppose you are the true Earth demigod.

t_ch: 我已垂暮，半神的名讳毫无意义。屹立于此的，只是「开山者」曾经的战友……
t_en: I am near my end, and the demigod title means nothing to me now. The being who stands here now is just the former comrade of the "Mountainbreaker"...

t_ch: 和遗弃他的背叛者。
t_en: And the traitor who abandoned him.

t_ch: 背叛者？
t_en: Traitor?

t_ch: 「荒笛」，这名字曾属于吉奥刻勒斯的龙骑兵团。这支部队以善战的骑手和他们骁勇的大地兽闻名。
t_en: Terravox was once a member of Geocles' Dromas Legion. This force was famous for its skilled riders and their brave dromases.

t_ch: 而它，便是与「开山者」同生共死的巨龙，大地兽之王。
t_en: Terravox themself was the Dromas King, the Giant Dragon who swore their life to the "Mountainbreaker."

t_ch: {RUBY_B#大地之泰坦}吉奥里亚{RUBY_E#}一战，面对这座难以逾越的高山，凯撒只能从内部瓦解。荒笛的倒戈成了逐火军致胜的关键。
t_en: In the battle against {RUBY_B#Earth Titan}Georios{RUBY_E#}, the Imperator could not surmount this mountain and thus had to break it from the inside. Terravox's betrayal was key to the Flame-Chase Army's victory.

t_ch: 神的时代已然落幕。生灵在地裂中适应了改变，也必须学会在史诗的夹缝求存。
t_en: The age of the gods was coming to an end. Living beings had adapted to the changes amidst the rifts of the earth, and now they had to learn to survive in the crevices of the epics.

t_ch: 需要有人来守望「大地」。所以，我接受了交易。接过泰坦神权，我沉入岩渊，以石铸的血肉弥合大陆。但……
t_en: Someone had to watch over the "Earth." So I agreed to a deal. I would take the Titan's divine authority and sink into the cliffs, using my flesh and blood forged of stone to mend the land. But...

t_ch: 唯有一桩「背叛」，我无法释怀。
t_en: There was one "betrayal" I could never forget.

t_ch: 「开山者」…他至死都不愿相信那是我的选择。面对凯撒劝降，他以死明志。
t_en: The "Mountainbreaker"... refused to believe that was my choice, even till his dying breath. Faced with having to surrender to the Imperator, he chose to die instead.

t_ch: 所以，这才是你和「长夜月」合谋的原因。
t_en: So this is why you decided to conspire with "Evernight."

t_ch: 「岁月」的陌客降临在我面前。名为「记忆」的天外伟力…不可思议。
t_en: "Time's" strange visitor appeared before me. The great power from beyond the sky called the Remembrance... It's incredible.

t_ch: 化作「忆灵」，吉奥刻勒斯得以重生。他口中喃喃着我们并肩作战的时光，一如这具身躯承载的所有{RUBY_B#记忆}生灵{RUBY_E#}。
t_en: Geocles was able to be reborn as a "memosprite." He mumbled about the times we fought side by side, just like how all the {RUBY_B#memories}lives{RUBY_E#} this body carries speak to me.

t_ch: 「长夜」开出的价码并不高昂，只要我施行「大地」神权，为她遮蔽行迹。
t_en: "Evernight" did not ask for much in return. She only wished for me to use the divine authority of "Earth" to hide her tracks.

t_ch: 愿意如此坦诚，你…放弃抵抗了么？
t_en: Since you're being so candid, does this mean... you've given up resisting?

t_ch: 呵，抵抗……
t_en: Hah, resistance...

t_ch: 一头将死的野兽，何谈抵抗？
t_en: For a beast on the brink of death, what is the point of resistance?

t_ch: 这样吗，千年过去了，你的心神…也早已支离破碎。
t_en: I see... A thousand years have passed, and your mind has long since been shattered.

t_ch: 这副垂老的身躯将自己背叛的一切尽数承载。现在，我只想在那不变的往日里……
t_en: This frail body bears the weight of all those I've betrayed, and now, my only wish is to rest with them...

t_ch: 和他们一同长眠。
t_en: In the unchanging past.

t_ch: 去吧，龙裔。那道烈焰已经洞穿「大地」守护的秘密……
t_en: Go, Long's Scion. That fiery blaze has already burned through "Earth's" protection, revealing the secrets underneath...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>翁法罗斯的至深之地，埋葬一切过往的大墓。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>The deepest depths in Amphoreus. The great tomb where all the past is buried.</color>

t_ch: 你寻找的「长夜月」，正是从其中走出。在她之前，无人知晓其存在。
t_en: The one you seek, "Evernight," walked out of that place. Before her arrival, no one knew of its existence.

t_ch: 换言之，那是「长夜月」现身的地点……
t_en: In other words, that is the place where "Evernight" came into being...

t_ch: 也是她如今的所在。
t_en: And it is also where she is now.

t_ch: 不惜沉沦在过去中，你的「记忆」都变成了这幅样貌…值得么？
t_en: You sank willingly into the past, and now your "memories" have turned into this form... Was it worth it?

t_ch: 至少，我还记得。
t_en: At least I still remember.

t_ch: 只要不曾忘记，他们就还活着。
t_en: As long as I never forget, they will live on.

t_ch: 原始、兽性…我理解这种本能。
t_en: Primitive and animalistic... I understand these instincts.

t_ch: 你，后悔过吗？
t_en: Have you ever regretted anything?

t_ch: 大地并非海洋中的孤岛，而是其上万物的总和。
t_en: The earth is not a lonely island in the middle of the ocean. It is the sum of all the living things that stand on it.

t_ch: 为捍卫世间生灵，我从未后悔。
t_en: I have never regretted defending the creatures of this world.

t_ch: 那么，最后一问……
t_en: Then, a final question...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>荒笛…时至今日，为了「不朽」龙力，你愿意做出多少牺牲？</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Terravox... After all this, how much are you willing to sacrifice for the power of the Permanence?</color>

t_ch: 一切。
t_en: Everything.

t_ch: 行路至此，我已彻底理解了自己的命运：无论如何抗争，「大地」终究无法迈向群星。
t_en: My journey up to here has allowed me to fully understood my destiny: No matter how I struggle, the "Earth" will never be able to reach the stars.

t_ch: 但，我的同胞，他们值得继续抗争。在生命的尽头，我想最后为他们争取一次行向未来的机会……
t_en: But my compatriots deserve to continue their struggle. At the end of my life, I want to make one last effort to give them a chance to move on to the future...

t_ch: 哪怕，那未来我已无法见证。
t_en: Even if it is a future I am not able to witness.

t_ch: 我明白了。那么……
t_en: I understand. Then...

t_ch: 和我一同，向不公的命运再发起一次反叛吧。
t_en: Join me in rebelling against this unjust fate once more.

t_ch: 即便世界崩落，「大地」也必须伫立——
t_en: Even if the world collapses, the "Earth" must remain unshaken.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>将你体内燃烧的火种交予我，由这具「不朽」的身躯为你承载生命的熔炉。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Give me the Coreflame that burns within you, and allow this immortal body of the Permanence to bear the furnace of life for you.</color>

t_ch: 龙裔…你愿意将它们带往新世界么？
t_en: Long's Scion... Are you willing to bring them all into the new world?

t_ch: 空洞的承诺，恐怕不是你想要的答案。让我试着从另一个角度作出回答吧。
t_en: I won't give you empty promises. Allow me to answer your question from a different perspective.

t_ch: 「不朽」是龙的道途，「永恒」是生命至深的渴望。你若将大地的生灵托付予我，它们定会与我血脉中的本能共生。
t_en: The Permanence is the path that dragons trod, and "eternity" is life's deepest desire. If you entrust the earth's living beings to me, they will live in symbiosis with the instincts in my blood.

t_ch: 以此身为舟，我会代你将它们送往明天。那里不是翁法罗斯的西风尽头……
t_en: With this body as an ark, I will deliver them to tomorrow for you. That tomorrow won't be the end of Amphoreus's west wind...

t_ch: 而是一片浩瀚无垠的星海。
t_en: But a vast and boundless sea of stars.

t_ch: 星海……
t_en: A sea of stars...

t_ch: 那是由众生并肩「开拓」的未来，而非一座将「记忆」用作耗材的囚笼。
t_en: It's a future where all beings can Trailblaze side by side, not a prison made from Remembrance.

t_ch: 在「永夜之帷」的记忆中，你自始至终…都是个有所保留的人。
t_en: In the Veil of Evernight's memories, you've always... been someone with reservations.

t_ch: 呵，是我错估了你的决心。我明白…何为唯一的选择。
t_en: Hah, I misjudged your resolve. I understand... This is the only choice.

t_ch: 看吧，我胸中燃烧的，这颗诞自「大地」的火种。它是生命萌芽的红土，万物的熔炉……
t_en: Behold, this Coreflame that burns in my chest. This Coreflame born from the "Earth." It is the redsoil from which life sprouts, and the furnace of all living things...

t_ch: 它告诉我，发起最后一次僭叛，将开垦荒土、守望大陆的重任交予天外的「开拓」……
t_en: It tells me to commit one final act of treason: Entrust this heavy task to the Trailblazers from beyond the sky. Let them tend to the wild terrain and safeguard the lands...

t_ch: 如此，将生生不息者——带向远方。
t_en: And thus bring the endless stream of life into the distant future.

t_ch: 我答应你，荒笛。
t_en: I promise you, Terravox.

t_ch: 如此便好。神权交替的刹那，此地定将分崩离析……
t_en: Good. When I hand over the divine authority, this place will fall to pieces.

t_ch: 扶圣树之将倾，你可做好准备？
t_en: Are you prepared to hold up the Sacred Tree if it falls?

t_ch: 当然。
t_en: Of course.

t_ch: 那便解放吾之残躯，赠予你这枚背离逐火之火吧——
t_en: Then free what remains of my body and let me give you this flame that turned away from the Flame-Chase—

t_ch: 我身为半神的职责，就于此刻将其卸下。
t_en: I now relinquish my duty as a demigod.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「汝将自掘坟墓，焚毁于叛逆的熔炉」……</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"You shall dig your own grave and burn in the furnace of rebellion"...</color>

t_ch: 但愿{RUBY_B#大地之泰坦}父亲{RUBY_E#}那久违的胸膛，接受我的回归。
t_en: I only hope that, after all this time, {RUBY_B#Earth Titan}Father{RUBY_E#} will take me back into their heart.

t_ch: 来吧，伏地的巨兽：为此世生生不息——
t_en: Come, crouching beast! For the endless life of this world...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>从蛰伏中更生，随我作腾飞的荒龙！</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Rise from your dormancy, and follow me as soaring dragons of the wilderness!</color>

t_ch: 所幸……
t_en: Fortunately...

t_ch: 最坏的结果，没有发生。
t_en: The worst did not come to pass.

t_ch: 若对方已沦作害兽，正好免去你的心理负担——如果那位半神心怀不轨，或誓死不从……
t_en: If your opponent had already turned into a vicious beast, whatever you did wouldn't weigh on your conscience... So what if that demigod had harbored ill intentions or vowed to fight to the death...

t_ch: 你会将枪尖指向它，亲手剜出这枚火种么？
t_en: Would you have pointed your spear at them and carved out the Coreflame with your own hands?

t_ch: 讨论「如果」没有意义。但，我很庆幸，结局终究没有落到那一步。
t_en: There's no point in discussing "what-ifs," though I am glad it didn't come to that.

t_ch: 无论如何，我都会试着以身入局，成为「再创世」的一部分。
t_en: Regardless, I will attempt to join this game and become a part of the Era Nova.

t_ch: 唯有如此，我才能对伙伴，还有这个世界，做到「问心无愧」。
t_en: This is the only way I can face my friends and this world with a "clear conscience."
Hah...

t_ch: 既已了却分别心，就该是你我道别的时刻了。
t_en: Now that things are settled between us, it's time for you and I to say goodbye.

t_ch: 至此，我留下的一切{RUBY_B#化为「不朽」的力量}尽数消散{RUBY_E#}。迈向属于你的「不朽」吧。
t_en: Everything that I left behind has {RUBY_B#become the power of the Permanence}faded away{RUBY_E#} at this point. Go and march toward your own "Permanence."

t_ch: 至于如何驯服它，将是你的问题。
t_en: As for how to tame it... I'll leave that to you.

t_ch: 谢谢。我们无法回到过去，做出更好的选择。但至少，我们会在未来的轮回中做得更好。
t_en: Thank you. We can't go back to the past and make better choices. But at least we can do better in the future.

t_ch: 抛却遍体鳞伤的龙蜕，才算是迎来了新生……
t_en: A dragon can only welcome new life by shedding away his old, scarred skin...

t_ch: 生来第一次，我感到如此轻松。
t_en: For the first time in my life, I feel at ease.

t_ch: 燃烧的火种…这就是「毁灭」的滋味么？
t_en: This burning Coreflame... Is this what the Destruction feels like?

t_ch: 这光芒，竟出乎意料地温暖…就像是……
t_en: The light is unexpectedly warm... It's just like...

t_ch: 每一次…从梦中醒来的片刻……
t_en: The fleeting moments... when one wakes from a dream...

t_ch: 别了，丹枫……
t_en: Farewell, Dan Feng...

t_ch: 现在，也该是我重新启程的时刻了。
t_en: Now... it's time for me to set out once more.

t_ch: 「大地」的最后一次反叛，是为世间生灵插上「开拓」的羽翼……
t_en: The final rebellion of "Earth" was to bestow Trailblazing wings upon all living beings...

t_ch: 对荒笛来说，这应该是最好的结局。
t_en: For Terravox, this was probably the best possible ending.

t_ch: 那道伤痕背后，就是它口中的「至深之地」。热汽告诉我，{NICKNAME}就在其中……
t_en: Behind that scar lies what they called the "deepest depths." The rising steam tells me that {NICKNAME} is in there...

t_ch: 但此刻，{F#她}{M#他}正陷于一片深不见底的漩涡。
t_en: But right now, {F#s}he's trapped in a bottomless whirlpool.

t_ch: 「长夜月」在{F#她}{M#他}身边么？
t_en: Is "Evernight" with {M#him?}{F#her?}

t_ch: 抱歉，我难以判断。
t_en: I'm afraid I can't tell.

t_ch: 炙热的深渊…若我一人贸然踏足其中，迷失在所难免。
t_en: A scorching abyss... If I were to enter it alone, I'd almost certainly get lost.

t_ch: 海瑟音女士，可否请你为我掩护？接下来，我必须全神贯注，恐怕无暇顾及周遭。
t_en: Miss Hysilens, would you give me cover? I'll need to focus completely on what's ahead and may not be able to pay attention to my surroundings.

t_ch: 要做什么？
t_en: What are you planning to do?

t_ch: 延续你先前的尝试。
t_en: I'm going to continue where you left off.

t_ch: 那位陌生人在我眼前掠走了「救世主」。我号令众水奔涌追逐，却被层岩阻断了流向……
t_en: The stranger snatched away the "Deliverer" right before my eyes. I commanded the waters to surge after them, but layered cliffs blocked the water's current...

t_ch: 今时不同往日，层岩…已尽在我的掌心。
t_en: Times have changed... The cliffs... are now in the palm of my hand.

t_ch: 我相信，这值得一试。
t_en: Then I believe it's worth a shot.

t_ch: 只是…若无万分坚定之心，你依旧会受到那片忆潮阻拦，更遑论从中打捞同伴。
t_en: It's just... without absolute resolve, you still won't be able to pass through that memoria tide, much less save someone from it.

t_ch: 寻找{NICKNAME}的过程，也许会漫长如永夜…务必小心，在「岁月」中彷徨，绝非易事。
t_en: The search for {NICKNAME} might stretch on like an evernight without end... Be careful. Wandering through "Time" is no easy feat.

t_ch: 不用担心，海瑟音女士。正如你在海底独守千年，我找回{NICKNAME}的决心……
t_en: Don't worry, Lady Hysilens. Just as you kept your lonely vigil in the depths for a thousand years, my determination to find {NICKNAME}...

t_ch: 也比「大地」更坚不可摧。
t_en: Is even more unshakeable than the "Earth" itself.

t_ch: 古老的圣树，将你的根系借给我吧。用我背负的火种，与这片陆地共鸣。
t_en: Ancient Sacred Tree, lend me your roots. With the Coreflame I carry, let me resonate with this land.

t_ch: 以天地为横轴，以时光为纵轴，我将找到那唯一的{RUBY_B#沉睡于忆潮的你}一点{RUBY_E#}。
t_en: With heaven and earth as my map and time as my compass, I will find {RUBY_B#you, asleep among memoria tide}that one singular point{RUBY_E#}.

t_ch: 哪怕要用我的双脚，遍历这山川大地的每一处角落……
t_en: Even if I must cross every mountain and valley on my own two feet...

t_ch: 我都会带你回家。
t_en: I will bring you home.

t_ch: 桀桀桀！玩水的装酷小子，没想到会在这里遇见你！
t_en: Hehehe! Look who it is! It's the water-splashing poser! Didn't think I'd catch you here!

t_ch: 你是…贼灵？巴特鲁斯？
t_en: Are you... the Spirithief? Bartholos?

t_ch: 这下面你们过不去的。
t_en: You can't get past this.

t_ch: 原来如此，多谢提醒，交给我的云吟术吧。
t_en: I see. Thank you for the advice. My cloudhymn magic will take it from here.

t_ch: 把你们的体力留在更重要的事情上吧，这个简单，交给本大爷我吧。
t_en: Save your energy for more important stuff! This is a piece of cake. Leave it to yours truly!

t_ch: 要想通过这里，方法多的是——桀桀桀，该轮到本大爷大显神通了！
t_en: There are plenty of ways to get through here. Hehehe, it's time for me to show you what I can do!

t_ch: 那就交给你了。
t_en: Then I'll leave it to you.

t_ch: 桀桀桀，轮到本大爷大显神通了！
t_en: Hehehe, it's time for me to show what I can do!

t_ch: 那地方是出水口，要是能堵上的话…这房间里的水会自然排空。
t_en: That's the water outlet. If we could block it... the water in this room would drain naturally.

t_ch: 桀桀桀，这里的所有出口都被我堵上了！本大爷不愧是「添堵大王」！
t_en: Hehehe, I've blocked all the inlets here! I'm truly the "lord of obstacles"!

t_ch: 慢着…还得帮他们搭个梯子…就用这个预言算碑吧？
t_en: Wait... I still need to make a ladder for them... let's use this Prophecy Tablet.

t_ch: 你的声音怎么了？
t_en: What happened to your voice?

t_ch: 都怪那个粉毛红眼睛的疯女人！为了不让她监视本大爷的一举一动，我特地把自己的嗓门封印起来了，桀桀桀！
t_en: It's all because of that crazy lady with pink hair and red eyes! In order to stop her from monitoring me, I sealed my voice, hehehe!

t_ch: 水位的问题已经完美解决了！要继续前进，就去搭那边的电梯吧！
t_en: The water problem is now all gone! Go take the elevator over there if you want to keep going.

t_ch: 桀桀桀，你来啦，你也是大老远听到了本大爷的英雄事迹吗？
t_en: Hehehe, so you've come! Did you also travel from afar after hearing tales of my heroic deeds?

t_ch: 不要解释，本大爷不喜欢解释，更喜欢你的直率！说吧，你是想听本大爷的英雄事迹，还是说想听想听本大爷的英雄事迹？
t_en: Don't explain! I hate long explanations, I much prefer your straightforwardness! So tell me, do you want to hear about my heroic deeds, or would you rather hear about my heroic deeds?

t_ch: 快讲给我听吧。
t_en: Tell me all about it!

t_ch: 当时的情况呀，是这样的……
t_en: So, here's what happened...

t_ch: 巴特鲁斯大爷的这番英雄事迹，就由你来见证吧！
t_en: Prepare to witness the Great Bartholos's heroic deeds!

t_ch: 我不想听。
t_en: I don't want to hear it.

t_ch: 桀桀桀，又轮到本大爷大显身手了！
t_en: Hehehe, once again, it's my turn to show you what I can do!

t_ch: 那就拜托你了。
t_en: I'm counting on you then.

t_ch: 巴特鲁斯大爷的这番英雄事迹，就由你来见证吧，装酷小子！
t_en: Prepare to witness the Great Bartholos's heroic deeds, poser boy!

t_ch: 稍等一下。
t_en: Just a minute.

t_ch: 让我猜猜…你们还有同伴被困在更下面？
t_en: Lemme guess... You still have friends trapped even deeper below?

t_ch: 嗷呜！不愧是巴特鲁斯大人！
t_en: Awoo! Your greatness truly knows no bounds Lord Bartholos!

t_ch: 那就简单了，我先把你们带走，你们来告诉我该怎么找……
t_en: That's easy. I'll take you away from here first, then you can tell me how to find your friends...

t_ch: 嗷～包在我的身上！
t_en: Awoo~ Leave it to me!

t_ch: 怎么回事，这只小海豹，别说是安全无恙，简直是有恃无恐……
t_en: What's with this baby seal! Yeah, it's safe, but it's also waaay too calm...
o((•'ω´• )o "Yo. You're here.")∋

t_ch: 该撤退了，巴特鲁斯大人来救我们了！
t_en: It's time to retreat. The Great Bartholos is here to save us!

t_ch: o((•'ω´- )o「不急，陪它们耍耍」)∋
t_en: o((•'ω´- )o "We're in no hurry. Let's toy with them a bit.")∋

t_ch: 桀桀桀，本大爷明白了，说吧！要怎么做？
t_en: Hehehe, I get it! Just tell me what to do!

t_ch: o((◣'ω´◢ )o「朝灵液匣开炮吧！狠狠豹杀它们」)∋
t_en: o((◣'ω´◢ )o "Fire at the ichor vessel! Slam them dead!")∋

t_ch: 明白！
t_en: Roger!

t_ch: 桀桀桀！全程没有一只小奇美拉或小海豹受到伤害！
t_en: Hehehe! Not a single Little Chimera or baby seal was harmed in the process!

t_ch: o((='ω´= )o「呼，差点就去见法吉娜了，真是值得纪念的大逃生」)∋
t_en: o((='ω´= )o "Phew, I almost ended up meeting Phagousa. What a memorable escape.")∋

t_ch: 多谢你的帮助，巴特鲁斯。
t_en: Thank you very much for your help, Bartholos.

t_ch: 桀桀桀，举手之劳而已！
t_en: Hehehe, no big deal — barely lifted a finger!

t_ch: 总之嘛，事情就是这么个事情……
t_en: So yeah, that's pretty much the whole story...

t_ch: 这里的小生灵，本大爷自会把它们带到安全的地方！至于你，就只要负责把贼灵大人的英勇事迹传颂下去就行了！
t_en: I'll take these little critters here somewhere safe. As for you... just make sure the brave tale of the Great Bartholos spreads far and wide!

t_ch: 最后一个问题…
t_en: One last question...

t_ch: …你是怎么活到现在的？
t_en: ...How have you managed to stay alive up until now?

t_ch: 「诡计」总会找到出路，小子！
t_en: "Trickery" will always find a way, boy!

t_ch: 记着，就算末日临近，只有贼灵大人的笑声不会被任何邪恶势力淹没——桀桀桀桀！
t_en: Remember... when the end of times approaches, the great Spirithief's laughter is the only thing that will never be drowned out by any powers of evil! Hehehehe!

t_ch: 这疯狂的气息，简直与魔阴身无异。
t_en: This madness seems exactly like a mara-struck.

t_ch: 云骑？怎么可能……
t_en: Cloud Knights? How is that possible...?

t_ch: 无穷无尽…忆潮卷土重来了么？
t_en: It's endless... Has the memoria tide returned?

t_ch: 孽火既生……
t_en: The fires of abomination reignite...

t_ch: 何不伴那水中月，一饮而尽？
t_en: Why not join that Water-Mirrored Moon and be fully imbibed?

t_ch: 说回荒笛。方才的挑衅，恐怕只是佯攻。
t_en: Speaking of Terravox, his aggression just now was probably some distraction.

t_ch: 其人疯狂，显而易见。
t_en: His madness is plain as day.

t_ch: 所见略同。
t_en: I agree.

t_ch: 不、不！别过来，你这头该死的野兽……
t_en: N—No! Stay back, you cursed beast...

t_ch: 空无一物，一片死寂……
t_en: There's not a single sign of movement here...

t_ch: 大约只是忆潮的回声吧。
t_en: That was probably just the echoes of the memoria tide.

t_ch: 荒笛已经倒戈！军团，随我冲锋！
t_en: Terravox has already defected! Legions, charge with me!

t_ch: 呵，野兽终究是野兽。
t_en: Hah, a beast will always be a beast.

t_ch: 这场战役未免太过残忍…
t_en: This campaign has been far too cruel...

t_ch: 让它成为逐火必要的牺牲吧。
t_en: Let them be a necessary sacrifice for the Flame-Chase.

t_ch: 掣地的伏龙啊，你将为弑主留名青史！
t_en: Seismic Walking Dragon, history shall remember you as a titan-slayer!

t_ch: 记忆交错。又一场背叛，一场浩劫。
t_en: Memories intersect. Another betrayal, another catastrophe.

t_ch: 看来，无论这回忆属于谁，荒笛都是其中的主角。
t_en: Regardless of whose memory this is, it seems that Terravox has a leading role in it.

t_ch: 一生都在「反叛」的野兽…不难理解，它为何如此疯狂了。
t_en: A beast that's been "rebelling" its whole life... No wonder they descended into madness.

t_ch: 那就劳驾了，海瑟音女士。
t_en: If you please, Lady Hysilens.

t_ch: 挽住这道水流吧，它残留着灰鱼儿的温度。
t_en: Hold onto this current, for it still carries the warmth of Gray Fry.

t_ch: 愿它能引领我们找到同伴藏身的海渊。
t_en: Hopefully, it will lead us to the depths where our companion is hidden.

t_ch: 海列屈拉…是你？
t_en: Helektra... Is that you?

t_ch: 这声音是……
t_en: Who's that...?

t_ch: 来得正好……
t_en: You're right on time...

t_ch: 就让「海洋」一同沉入忆潮……
t_en: Let the "Ocean" sink into the memoria tide...

t_ch: 加入复活「大地」的献祭！
t_en: And become part of the sacrifice to resurrect the "Earth"!

t_ch: 龙裔，沉沦吧…！
t_en: Long's Scion... fall into oblivion!

t_ch: 忆潮汹涌而来。坚持住，别被掠走心神。
t_en: The memoria tide surges violently. Hold on, and don't let your focus be swept away.

t_ch: 整个树庭，都在震颤……
t_en: The whole Grove is shaking...

t_ch: 如何，坚持得住么？
t_en: How are you doing? Can you keep going?

t_ch: 当然。
t_en: Of course.

t_ch: 若不做兽行，持明更遑论为人！
t_en: Vidyadhara might not even be considered people if we did not resort to beastly actions!

t_ch: 为什么，丹枫当年选择了我？
t_en: Why did Dan Feng choose me all those years ago?

t_ch: 人有五名……
t_en: Of five people...

t_ch: 代价有三……
t_en: Three must pay a price...

t_ch: 你，是其中之一。
t_en: You... are one of them.

t_ch: 结束了么……
t_en: Is it over...?

t_ch: 看来是了。那些侵扰你的幻影……
t_en: It seems so. These phantoms that are haunting you...

t_ch: 诚是为置你于死地而来啊。
t_en: Are indeed here to bring you to your demise.

t_ch: 这壶酒…模样倒是新奇。又是白珩带来的？
t_en: This is an interesting-looking wine jar. Was it Baiheng who brought it?

t_ch: 是她留下的塔拉萨特产，专为这一趟聚会准备的。
t_en: It's a specialty from Thalassa that she brought and left here just for this gathering.

t_ch: 结果她自己倒是没来。
t_en: But she herself didn't come.

t_ch: 离开这里，去找那疯狂的半神…做个了断。
t_en: Let's leave this place and go settle things with that mad demigod.

t_ch: 看见了，「毁灭」指向的终点。
t_en: I see the destination that the Destruction points to.

t_ch: 金血汨汨而出…仿佛破溃的心脏。
t_en: Golden blood is gurgling out... It's almost like a heart that has burst open.

t_ch: 循着水流，平息它疯狂的鼓动吧。
t_en: Follow the current and calm its frenzied pulse.

t_ch: 此情此景…呵，何其相似。
t_en: This feeling, this scene... Hah, all too similar.

t_ch: 桀桀桀，没想到这里的水已经这么深了…没了本大爷，这里该怎么办呀！
t_en: Hehehe, didn't think the water here had gotten this deep. What would you all do without me?

t_ch: 嗷呜！那地方是出水口，要是能堵上的话……
t_en: Awoo! That's the water inlet. If we can block it...

t_ch: 这房间里的水会自然排空，对吧？交给本大爷吧！
t_en: Then the water in this room would gradually empty out, right? Leave it to me!

t_ch: 给人「添堵」——桀桀桀，我最擅长的就是这个！
t_en: Providing "obstacles" for people — Hehehe, that's what I do best!

t_ch: 弹尽粮绝了呐…胡说，这点困难怎么可能难倒本大爷！让我想想……
t_en: We're out of options and ammo— As if! That won't stop the Great Bartholos! Lemme think a minute...

t_ch: 补充一些现成的凝胶子弹好了……
t_en: Let's replenish some ready-made gel bullets...

t_ch: 没想到神悟树庭的学问竟然包含了那么多「水分」……
t_en: I didn't think the Grove of Epiphany's knowledge would be so "diluted"...

t_ch: 桀桀桀，跟之前一样，只要把出水口堵住就成。
t_en: Hehehe. We just need to block the water inlet, just like before.

t_ch: 堵堵堵！这是一场「豪堵」，朋友！
t_en: Jam it, jam it, jam it all up! This is some glorious jamming, friends!

t_ch: 豹杀清场，桀桀桀～
t_en: A total wipeout! Hehehe~

t_ch: 看来，还能再「堵一堵」，朋友！
t_en: Seems like we can still "jam it up more," friend!

t_ch: 为了我们遥远的未来～♪年轻的光辉，照耀着银河宇宙～♪
t_en: For our distant future~♪ A young light~ Shining upon the cosmos~♪

t_ch: 荒笛大人你在哪里？
t_en: Lord Terravox, where are you?

t_ch: 荒笛大人背叛了我们…
t_en: Lord Terravox has betrayed us...

t_ch: 终于……
t_en: Finally...

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，我找到你了。
t_en: I've found you, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 丹恒，好久不见…
t_en: Dan Heng, it's been a while...

t_ch: 真的…好久不见了。
t_en: It really has... been a long time.

t_ch: 别那么感伤啊，这不像你。
t_en: Don't be so sentimental. That's not like you.

t_ch: 丹恒，你…长高了？
t_en: Dan Heng, did you... get taller?

t_ch: 好久不见，你…长高了？
t_en: Long time no see. Did you... get taller?

t_ch: 嗯。你被困住的时候，我经历了…许多事。
t_en: Heh. While you were trapped, I experienced... a lot.

t_ch: 丹恒，等你好久了。
t_en: I've been waiting for you for so long, Dan Heng.

t_ch: 丹恒，我知道…你会回来的。
t_en: Dan Heng, I knew... you would come back.

t_ch: 嗯。你被困住的时候，我经历了…许多事。
t_en: Heh. While you were trapped, I experienced... a lot.

t_ch: 万幸，「长夜月」没有出手阻拦。看来这一次，我们成功抢占了先机。
t_en: Thankfully, "Evernight" did not try to stop me. Looks like we've managed to stay ahead of her this time.

t_ch: 必须救回三月七。
t_en: We must save March 7th.

t_ch: 放心，没有人会放弃她。我们会一起返回列车…一个不落。
t_en: Rest assured, we won't abandon her. We'll all return to the Express together... No one will be left behind.

t_ch: 昔涟…她在哪里？
t_en: What about Cyrene? Where is she?

t_ch: 你指「迷迷」吗？抱歉，这一路上我都没遇见她。恐怕被「长夜月」囚禁的，不止你一人。
t_en: You mean "Mem"? Sorry, I haven't seen her at all on this journey. Perhaps you were not the only one being held captive by "Evernight."

t_ch: 列车组还好吗？
t_en: How's the Express Crew doing?

t_ch: 他们一直心系你、我，还有三月七的安危。即便身处世界外，也从未停下过救援。
t_en: They never once stopped worrying about us, about you, me, or March 7th. They never gave up on trying to save us, even from outside this world.

t_ch: 姬子小姐、瓦尔特先生、帕姆，还有星期日、黑天鹅、两位天才…所有人都在尽己所能相助。
t_en: Miss Himeko, Mr. Yang, Pom-Pom, and even Sunday, Black Swan, and the two geniuses... They are all doing everything in their power to aid us.

t_ch: 那片忆潮中，她无处不在……
t_en: She was everywhere in the memoria tide...

t_ch: 我明白。她的力量…不容小觑。
t_en: I understand. Her power... shouldn't be underestimated.

t_ch: 亲身踏入那座「岁月」的迷宫时，我才猛然想起…自己和她早有过一面之缘。
t_en: It was only when I personally stepped into the maze of "Time" that it suddenly struck me... She and I had crossed paths once before.

t_ch: 我只警告一次——立刻，离开她的身体。
t_en: I'll only warn you once. Leave her body. Now.

t_ch: 这些黑色的浮游物，我仿佛在哪里见过……
t_en: I feel like I've seen these floating black things somewhere before...

t_ch: 离开翁法罗斯时，我无意中和她产生过接触。或许是不想暴露行踪，她从我的脑海中剥离了那段记忆。
t_en: I had an unexpected encounter with her when I left Amphoreus. Perhaps to avoid exposing her whereabouts, she stripped that memory from my mind.

t_ch: 那股名为「忘却」的力量…与令使无异。
t_en: That power called "Oblivion"... it's just like an Emanator's.
(Oblivion...)

t_ch: 她想要清洗「负世」的记忆。
t_en: She wants to erase "Worldbearing's" memories.

t_ch: 她计划让我遗忘一切…
t_en: She planned to make me forget everything...

t_ch: 我知道。但现在，你还记得我，记得我们的伙伴。
t_en: I know. But you still remember me and our companions for now.

t_ch: 对于可能丢失的记忆，你有任何头绪吗？
t_en: Do you have any clues about the memories you may have lost?

t_ch: 似乎没什么异常…
t_en: Nothing seems out of the ordinary...

t_ch: 如果我没猜错，按照长夜月的计划，她打算让你遗忘翁法罗斯，包括与我们同行至今的黄金裔。
t_en: If I'm not mistaken, Evernight's plan is to make you forget Amphoreus, including the Chrysos Heirs who have journeyed with us up till now.

t_ch: 「凡人、缺陷者、失败的英雄」…
t_en: "Mere mortals. Flawed individuals. Failed heroes..."

t_ch: 这是「长夜月」的原话么…如果没理解错，她打算让你遗忘翁法罗斯，包括与我们同行至今的黄金裔。
t_en: Are those "Evernight's" exact words? If I'm not mistaken, she intends to make you forget Amphoreus, including the Chrysos Heirs who have journeyed with us up till now.

t_ch: 可看上去，你也还认识这位海瑟音女士。
t_en: But it seems you still recognize Lady Hysilens.

t_ch: 倘若是小灰鱼儿对我印象深刻，我自然欣喜。
t_en: If I made that much of an impression on Little Gray Fry, then I am naturally delighted.

t_ch: 但恐怕，你能从那「忘却」的力量中幸免……
t_en: But I fear your escape from that power they call "Oblivion"...

t_ch: 另有一位功臣。
t_en: Is thanks to someone else.

t_ch: 遐蝶…？
t_en: Castorice...?

t_ch: 是你…保护了我？
t_en: Was it you... who protected me?

t_ch: 初次见面，或者…别来无恙，阁下。
t_en: Nice to meet you, or... maybe I should ask, how have you been since we last saw each other?

t_ch: 方才，从漩涡深处被一同打捞上来的，还有这道小蝶鱼的记忆。
t_en: Along with you, this little butterflyfish's memory was also salvaged from the depths of that whirlpool.

t_ch: 恰如蚌壳之于明珠…塞纳托斯的权能包裹着你，使你的灵魂免受侵蚀。
t_en: Just as a pearl is cradled within its shell... the power of Thanatos surrounds you, shielding your soul from corrosion.

t_ch: 昔涟小姐和我反复提起过你，{NICKNAME}阁下。尽管此世我们未能相逢，但我相信…有一种温度足以跨越时间。
t_en: Miss Cyrene has spoken of you often to me, {NICKNAME}. Though we never met in this life, I believe... there's a kind of warmth that can transcend time itself.

t_ch: 漫长的时光里，我守护着斯缇科西亚与涡心的密道。当逆流的忆潮渗入冥河，即便深陷沉睡，我也能感受到那一丝温暖……
t_en: Through the endless flow of time, I guarded the secret passage between Styxia and the Vortex. When the memoria tide flowed backwards into the River of Souls, even in deep slumber, I could feel that warmth...

t_ch: 并倾尽全力，将其呵护。
t_en: And with all my might, I protected that warmth.

t_ch: 此举或有失礼节，还请阁下见谅。
t_en: I apologize if that seemed improper. I hope you'll forgive me.

t_ch: 谢谢你，遐蝶。
t_en: Thank you, Castorice.

t_ch: 无论如何，你保护了我。
t_en: In the end, you were there for me.

t_ch: 我的拥抱果然很温暖嘛。
t_en: See, I really am a heartwarming {F#girl}{M#guy} deep down.

t_ch: 她只是在用比喻…这番对话好像在哪里见过。
t_en: She was just speaking metaphorically... This conversation feels familiar somehow.

t_ch: 哈哈……
t_en: Haha...

t_ch: 我知道，阁下还有未竟的使命。此行艰险，即便身躯囿于溟流，我也会竭力看护二位的去路。
t_en: I understand that your mission is still unfinished. The path ahead is treacherous, and even though my body is bound to these dark currents, I'll do everything I can to watch over you both.

t_ch: 小蝶鱼说得没错，仍有{RUBY_B#「赞达尔」}一双眼睛{RUBY_E#}在暗中眈视——但我们不会给他从背后接近二位的机会。
t_en: The little butterflyfish is right. There is still {RUBY_B#Zandar}a pair of eyes{RUBY_E#} watching from the shadows, but we won't let them get anywhere near you.

t_ch: 前进吧，金色的龙鱼，还有「救世主」，去寻找你们的同伴……
t_en: Go forth, golden dragonfish, and you, "Deliverer," seek out your companion...

t_ch: 去照亮那无光的「长夜」。
t_en: Go forth and illuminate the lightless "Evernight."

t_ch: 感激不尽。请收下无名客的承诺：翁法罗斯，一定能为自己写下崭新的结局。
t_en: I cannot thank you enough. Accept this promise from the Nameless: Amphoreus will definitely write a brand-new ending for itself.

t_ch: 当然，我们会共同写就。
t_en: Of course, we'll write it together.

t_ch: 谢谢你，海瑟音。
t_en: Thank you, Hysilens.

t_ch: 也谢谢你，遐蝶。
t_en: Thank you too, Castorice.

t_ch: 无名客的脚步不会停下……
t_en: The Nameless will never stop...

t_ch: 直到我们所有人，在真正的新世界并肩。
t_en: Until all of us stand side by side in the true new world.

t_ch: 「花海尽头，生者的魂灵将温暖汝之指尖。相拥之后，便是永恒的离别。」
t_en: "At the end of the sea of flowers, the souls of the living shall warm thy fingertips, and after an embrace, there shall be eternal separation."

t_ch: 若非在世界的尽头遇见了阁下，我还以为缇宁老师的预言出错了呢。
t_en: If I hadn't met you at the end of the world, I would've thought Lady Trinnon's prophecy was wrong.

t_ch: 再会，遐蝶。
t_en: Goodbye, Castorice.

t_ch: 再会，{NICKNAME}阁下。
t_en: Goodbye, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 若有机会，我也想多停留片刻。只是，翁法罗斯还未抵达花海的尽头……
t_en: If I could, I'd want to stay a little longer, but... Amphoreus is yet to reach the end of the sea of flowers.

t_ch: 新世界里，花海一定会绽放。
t_en: In the new world, the sea of flowers will surely bloom.

t_ch: 缇宁老师说过，命运不是生长在道路尽头的花朵，而是人们自己踏出的小径。
t_en: As Lady Trinnon used to say, fate is not the flowers that bloom at the end of the road, but where people tread beyond the gate...

t_ch: 谢谢你，{NICKNAME}阁下。属于我的那一条…也走到了温暖的终点。
t_en: Thank you, {NICKNAME}. My own path... has finally come to a gentle end.

t_ch: 请你带上所有美好的愿望，坚定前进，不要回头。
t_en: Take all beautiful wishes with you, march forward with determination, and don't look back.

t_ch: 小灰鱼儿，大胆前进吧——我的洋流会拱卫你的来时，歌声会陪伴你的去路。
t_en: Go forth with courage, Little Gray Fry. My ocean currents will guard your arrival, and my songs will accompany your journey ahead.

t_ch: 再会，海瑟音。
t_en: Goodbye, Hysilens.

t_ch: 再会，小鱼儿。
t_en: Farewell, Little Fry.

t_ch: 等我凯旋，也给你开篝火晚宴。
t_en: When I return victorious, I'll throw a bonfire feast for you.

t_ch: 呵…你还记得我喜欢火和宴会哪。那就说定了，你也要找回伙伴，完成旅行。
t_en: Hehe... You still remember how much I love fire and feasts. All right then, it's a promise. Go find your companion and see your journey through.

t_ch: 我会举杯等你凯旋，而后……
t_en: I'll raise a glass while I await your triumphant return, and then...

t_ch: 于那天地境界之海重逢的一刻，请让我在火光中，为你奏唱一曲吧。
t_en: When we reunite in the ocean at the boundaries of this world, let me play a song for you beneath the glow of fire.

t_ch: 一道毁天灭地的金光，将天空、圣树、山岭尽数洞穿。从这里望去，你看见那道伤痕背后的光芒依旧在燃烧。
t_en: A golden light that can destroy the world pierces through the sky, the Sacred Tree, and the mountains. Looking from where you are, you see that the light behind that scar burns still.

t_ch: 白厄，他仍在和「毁灭」抗争。海瑟音与遐蝶，也在守望我们的来路。
t_en: Phainon is still fighting against the Destruction. Hysilens and Castorice remain on watch, guarding the path that led us here.

t_ch: 唯有前进，才不会辜负所有黄金裔的努力。
t_en: Only by moving forward can we honor the efforts of all Chrysos Heirs.

t_ch: 这是……
t_en: Is this...

t_ch: 形如「翁法罗斯」的符号？
t_en: A symbol in the shape of "Amphoreus"?

t_ch: 从未在世界内部见过…
t_en: I've never seen it anywhere in this world before...

t_ch: 这是自然。一个封闭在权杖中的世界，要如何看见自己在外层空间的模样？
t_en: Naturally. How could a world enclosed within the scepter have a way of knowing what it looks like from outer space?

t_ch: 总感觉，我在哪里见过…
t_en: I feel like I've seen this somewhere before...

t_ch: 在哪里？还能想起来么？
t_en: Where was it? Can you remember?

t_ch: 对了，是《如我所书》…
t_en: Oh right, it was in As I've Written...

t_ch: 「翻开这本书吧，我会在过去等你。」
t_en: "Now, open this book. I'll be waiting for you in the past."

t_ch: 似乎是在缇宝的记忆里…
t_en: I think... it was in Tribbie's memories.

t_ch: 「倾覆诸神吧—— / 归还火种吧——」
t_en: "Overthrow the gods— / Restore the Coreflames—"

t_ch: 还记得么？晨昏之眼的壁画…
t_en: Remember? The Eye of Twilight's mural...

t_ch: 这是…描绘哪位泰坦的画像。
t_en: Which Titan is this?

t_ch: 很相似，但又有所不同。
t_en: It's very similar, yet somewhat different.

t_ch: 这不合理。一个封闭在权杖中的世界，要如何看见自己在外层空间的模样？
t_en: That doesn't make sense. How could a world enclosed within the scepter have a way of knowing what it looks like from outer space?

t_ch: 除非，不是壁画画出了翁法罗斯的外观…而是见过这幅壁画的人，把世界变成了如今的模样？
t_en: Unless... the mural isn't a drawing of Amphoreus... but rather someone saw the mural and shaped the world in its image?

t_ch: 那个人，会是「赞达尔」吗？
t_en: Could that someone be "Zandar"?

t_ch: …不。他的妥协，正说明「长夜月」藏身的此处是实验的盲点。
t_en: ...No. His concession proves that this place where "Evernight" is hiding must be a blind spot of the experiment.

t_ch: 恐怕，就连「赞达尔」也不知道这座大墓的存在，以及埋藏其中的秘密。
t_en: I'm afraid not even "Zandar" knows about the existence of this great tomb, or the secrets buried within it.

t_ch: 终于，让我们抓住了他的软肋。
t_en: Finally, we've found his weakness.

t_ch: 不能太得意，连他都无从知晓的秘密，一定极其特殊，或者…极其危险。
t_en: Best not get carried away. For something to be hidden even from him, it must be either extraordinary... or unimaginably dangerous.

t_ch: 他的造物再一次失去了控制？
t_en: Did his creation go out of control again?

t_ch: 眼下还无法判断，但这一定不是他乐于看见的结果。连他都无从知晓的秘密，一定极其特殊，或者…极其危险。
t_en: It's hard to tell right now, but this definitely isn't the outcome he wants to see. For something to be hidden even from him, it must be either extraordinary... or unimaginably dangerous.

t_ch: 他在利用我挖掘这些秘密。
t_en: He's using me to dig up these secrets.

t_ch: 他一定心存算计。但这一世，在众黄金裔毫无保留的相助下，主导权始终在我们这边。
t_en: He must be calculating something. But this time, with the Chrysos Heirs giving us their full support, we've had the upper hand from the start.

t_ch: 这处禁地，「赞达尔」无从察觉，白厄的一击也只能洞穿入口，可「长夜月」却能在其中随意溯游……
t_en: This forbidden realm remains undetectable to "Zandar," and even Phainon's strike merely opened the entrance, yet "Evernight" can freely swim through it as she pleases...

t_ch: 难以被「智识」触及，也无法被「毁灭」抹消……
t_en: It cannot be reached by the Erudition, nor can it be erased by the Destruction...

t_ch: 务必小心。长眠在地底的，或许正是翁法罗斯的最后一道命途——「记忆」。
t_en: Be careful. What lies dormant beneath may well be Amphoreus's final Path — Remembrance.

t_ch: 「记忆」的漩涡，深不见底……
t_en: The whirlpool of Remembrance, bottomless and unfathomable...

t_ch: 这片迷雾背后，想必就是「长夜月」的领域了。
t_en: Behind this mist must be "Evernight's" domain.

t_ch: 准备好了么，{NICKNAME}？一旦踏入其中，恐怕就没有退路了。
t_en: Ready, {NICKNAME}? Once we step inside, I'm afraid there'll be no turning back.

t_ch: 走吧，为了三月七。
t_en: Let's go! For March 7th.

t_ch: 三月，她一定在等待和我们重逢。
t_en: March 7th is surely waiting to see us again.

t_ch: 出发吧！踏上「开拓」，绝不落下一人。
t_en: Let's go! On the Trailblaze, no one gets left behind!

t_ch: 出发吧，拯救这个世界。
t_en: Let's go and save this world.

t_ch: 为了三月七，也为了翁法罗斯……
t_en: For March 7th, and for Amphoreus...

t_ch: 出发吧！踏上「开拓」，绝不落下一人。
t_en: Let's go! On the Trailblaze, no one gets left behind!

t_ch: 先等等…
t_en: Let's wait for a moment...

t_ch: 事关重大，做足准备吧。我等你，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: This is important, so make sure you're fully prepared. I'll be waiting for you, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 准备好了么，{NICKNAME}？一旦踏入其中，恐怕就没有退路了。
t_en: Ready, {NICKNAME}? Once we step inside, I'm afraid there'll be no turning back.

t_ch: 走吧，为了三月七。
t_en: Let's go! For March 7th.

t_ch: 三月，她一定在等待和我们重逢。
t_en: March 7th is surely waiting to see us again.

t_ch: 出发吧！踏上「开拓」，绝不落下一人。
t_en: Let's go! On the Trailblaze, no one gets left behind!

t_ch: 出发吧，拯救这个世界。
t_en: Let's go and save this world.

t_ch: 为了三月七，也为了翁法罗斯……
t_en: For March 7th, and for Amphoreus...

t_ch: 出发吧！踏上「开拓」，绝不落下一人。
t_en: Let's go! On the Trailblaze, no one gets left behind!

t_ch: 先等等…
t_en: Let's wait for a moment...

t_ch: 事关重大，做足准备吧。我等你，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: This is important, so make sure you're fully prepared. I'll be waiting for you, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 这里，曾是墨涅塔的祭坛……
t_en: This place was once Mnestia's altar...

t_ch: 金丝引向的，会是世界最深的秘密么？
t_en: Could the golden thread be leading us to the world's deepest secret?

t_ch: 好漫长，仿佛正坠入深渊……
t_en: It's endless... It feels like we're plunging into an abyss...

t_ch: 远方的建筑群，都是被封葬的数据么……
t_en: Are those distant structures... all entombed data?

t_ch: 话虽如此，我也得为长远考虑。
t_en: Even so, I must think long-term.

t_ch: 本想潜伏在暗处，避免正面冲突。但……
t_en: I wanted to hide in the shadows to avoid direct conflict, but...

t_ch: 为何是一片死寂？
t_en: Why is it so quiet here?

t_ch: 空间中弥漫着浓郁的忆质，却又驳杂不堪，像是破碎的记忆被糅合在一起。
t_en: The air is thick with memoria, yet it's so chaotic, like broken memories all mixed together.

t_ch: 窃忆者本该大量涌入翁法罗斯，这里应该「热闹非凡」才对……
t_en: Memosnatchers should be swarming into Amphoreus. I was expecting this place to be "very lively"...

t_ch: 但他们…怎么变成了这样？
t_en: So... how did they end up like this?

t_ch: …空壳。维持这具法身的心识消失了。手段干脆利落，不留半点痕迹。
t_en: ...An empty shell. The consciousness that maintained this dharmakāya has disappeared. So efficient... Not a single trace left behind.

t_ch: 另一种可能性是，为了某种更隐秘的目的，她献祭了自身。
t_en: Alternatively, she might have sacrificed herself for an even more mysterious purpose.

t_ch: 无论出于哪种原因。究竟是什么，让这群狂热的信徒落得如此下场？
t_en: Either way, what exactly made these fanatical believers end up like this?

t_ch: 「记忆」啊…果然是诱人又危险的深海。水面下，总是藏着令人着迷的秘密。
t_en: Ah, "memory"... It is indeed a deep ocean of dangerous allure, where fascinating secrets always hide beneath the waters.

t_ch: 「准备好，该启程了。」
t_en: "Get ready. We're about to head off."

t_ch: 「没问题么？那个世界被一团混沌的物质包裹着。那条白色光带…已经害我们的计划失败很多次了。」
t_en: "Is it really gonna be okay? That world's surrounded by a mass of chaotic material... That white band of light has already foiled our plans multiple times."

t_ch: 「别担心。自从星穹列车的粉色姑娘闯入翁法罗斯后……」
t_en: "Don't worry. After the pink girl from the Astral Express broke into Amphoreus..."

t_ch: 「<color=#dbc291ff>那道将忆庭隔绝在外的阻力就消失了。</color>」
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"...That obstructive force preventing the Garden from entry disappeared."</color>

t_ch: 「到底是『开拓』的无名客，帮了大忙。」
t_en: "That's the Trailblazing Nameless for you. A huge help."

t_ch: 「你高兴什么？不相干的人越多，事情不是越麻烦？万一那帮开拓者先一步找到了<color=#dbc291ff>『记忆』的种子</color>……」
t_en: "What are you so happy for? Aren't things gonna get messier with more irrelevant people turning up? What if those Trailblazers find the <color=#dbc291ff>seed of Remembrance</color> before we do..."

t_ch: 「那我们再把它偷过来，不就完事了？」
t_en: "Then we'll just steal it back. Simple."

t_ch: 「说到这个，那列车上有一个信使，一个忆者，立场不明。动手时，可别被她们察觉了。」
t_en: "By the way, there's a Messenger and a Memokeeper on that Express. We don't know where they stand on this matter, so make sure they don't notice you when you make your move."

t_ch: 真是无孔不入啊。
t_en: You folks are truly everywhere.

t_ch: 和上一具空壳不同，这些窃忆者……
t_en: Hmm. These Memosnatchers are different from the previous husks. These ones...

t_ch: 似乎和{NICKNAME}有过接触。
t_en: ...Seem to have had contact with {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 为了取得你的信任，咱们就先自报家门——流光忆庭，你应该再熟悉不过了吧？
t_en: We'll introduce ourselves to gain your trust. We are the Garden of Recollection. You should be very familiar with that name by now.

t_ch: 记忆戛然而止，仿佛被一只无形的手掐灭了烛火。
t_en: This memory ends so abruptly, as if a shapeless hand snuffed out its candlelight.

t_ch: 如此看来，前方的秘密比想象中还要浑浊得多。
t_en: It appears the secrets ahead are even murkier than I imagined.

t_ch: 真是…诡异的光景。
t_en: What a... bizarre sight.

t_ch: 「失控了，完全失控了……」
t_en: "It's spinning out of control... Everything's out of control..."

t_ch: 「为什么没人告诉我们？！」
t_en: "Why did no one tell us!?"

t_ch: 「那女孩…<color=#dbc291ff>是忆者的天敌</color>……」
t_en: "That girl... is <color=#dbc291ff>the Memokeepers' nemesis</color>..."

t_ch: 她说的，是三月七？
t_en: Is she talking about March 7th?

t_ch: 「那片长夜…那些黑色的忆灵…它们吞噬了一切……」
t_en: "That evernight... Those black memosprites... They swallowed everything..."

t_ch: 「先出发的人…全都被淹没了…连一丝心识都没有留下……」
t_en: "Those who came here first... all drowned... Not even a trace of their consciousness was left behind..."

t_ch: 「我后悔了…我不想再和翁法罗斯扯上任何关系了！求求你！」
t_en: "I wish I'd never come here... I don't want anything to do with Amphoreus anymore! Please! I'm begging you!"

t_ch: 「别、别靠近我——不——！」
t_en: "D—Don't come near me— N—Nooo!"

t_ch: 为了「神陨的记忆」，你们牵连了太多无辜的人。罪有应得。
t_en: You've involved too many innocent people just to obtain the "Memory of an Aeon's Fall." You deserve this.

t_ch: 但我不是为了谴责而来。
t_en: But I'm not here to blame you.

t_ch: 被你们称作「长夜」的存在，告诉我有关她的一切。
t_en: That entity you call "Evernight"... Tell me everything you know about her.

t_ch: 或许，这还能为幸存者换来一线生机。
t_en: We may yet bring a glimmer of hope for those who are still alive in there.

t_ch: 「<color=#dbc291ff>善见…天……</color>」
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"Eden... of Blessed Insight..."</color>
Huh...?

t_ch: 「原来。是这样。我们。被骗了。」
t_en: "So that's. What happened. We. Were tricked."

t_ch: 「我们。是牺牲品。忆庭。利用了我们。<color=#dbc291ff>『无漏净子』。抛弃了我们。</color>」
t_en: "We. Are the sacrifice. The Garden. Used us. <color=#dbc291ff>The 'Pure Child of Anāsrava.' Abandoned us.</color>"

t_ch: 「她只想。找到。失散的姐妹。」
t_en: "She just. Wants to find. Her lost sisters."

t_ch: 「找到她们。杀死她们。回收她们。」
t_en: "Find them. Kill them. Reclaim them."

t_ch: 「新的生命若要萌芽。它的种子须是死的。」
t_en: "If a new life is to be born. Its seed has to be dead."

t_ch: 「死的。死的。死的。死的。」
t_en: "Dead. Dead. Dead. Dead."

t_ch: 「死的死的死的死的死的死的死的死的死的死的死的死的——」
t_en: "Dead dead dead dead dead dead dead dead dead dead dead dead—"

t_ch: 现在，我终于能理解你们的恐惧了。
t_en: Heh. I can finally understand your fears now.

t_ch: 感谢你提供的情报。这些信息…很有价值。
t_en: Thank you for the information. It was... very valuable.

t_ch: 作为答谢，我会将你们仅存的心识带离此地。
t_en: I'll take your remaining consciousness out of here as a gesture of thanks.

t_ch: 既是保护，也是惩罚。在一位天才的镜子里，你们能够与同伴重逢，好好反省自己的作为。
t_en: It'll serve as both protection and a punishment. You'll reunite with your peers in a genius's mirror, where you can reflect long and hard on your past actions.

t_ch: 但，这一切的前提是……
t_en: Well... provided that—

t_ch: 我能够从她面前，全身而退。
t_en: I can survive my encounter with her.

t_ch: 这群小家伙，看上去可怕…其实也不难搞定嘛。
t_en: These little critters look scary... but they're not so tough to handle after all.

t_ch: 可是，翻涌的忆潮把{NICKNAME}卷走了，必须要赶在「长夜月」小姐得手前，回到{F#她}{M#他}身边……
t_en: Though the surging memoria tide swept {NICKNAME} away... I must return to {M#his}{F#her} side before Miss "Evernight" succeeds.

t_ch: 又是这种潜入剧本，也行吧！帮帮我，{NICKNAME}的内心世界……
t_en: Another one of these stealth missions, huh? Help me out here, {NICKNAME}'s inner world...

t_ch: {RUBY_B#「毁灭」}炙热又危险{RUBY_E#}的气息，这是…和白厄同源的力量。
t_en: {RUBY_B#the Destruction}A scorching and dangerous aura{RUBY_E#}... This power... shares the same origin as Phainon.

t_ch: 还有，像是在午夜惊醒的，{RUBY_B#「忘却」}神秘又深不见底{RUBY_E#}的气息…想必是「长夜月」小姐吧，必须得绕开才行。
t_en: And then there's that {RUBY_B#"Oblivion"}enigmatic, bottomless{RUBY_E#} aura that seems to jolt awake at midnight... Must be Miss "Evernight." Better steer clear of her.

t_ch: 嗯？那里有一束光……
t_en: Hm? There's a beam of light over there...

t_ch: 充满朝气，又不受控制，比其他的更熟悉，似乎就来自人家身边……
t_en: Full of energy, yet uncontrollable. More familiar than the others, as if it's coming from someone close by...

t_ch: 是…{NICKNAME}吗！也许，是{F#她}{M#他}提起过的「星核」吧。
t_en: Could it be... {NICKNAME}! Maybe it's the "Stellaron" {F#s}he mentioned.

t_ch: 有关「星核」的记忆，就在忆潮深处流淌……
t_en: Memories of the Stellaron are flowing deep within the memoria tide...

t_ch: 去那里寻找{NICKNAME}的下落吧。
t_en: Let's go there to find {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 在「长夜月」阻止星期日的同时，滞留在{NICKNAME}记忆世界中的昔涟另有发现……
t_en: While Evernight was stopping Sunday, Cyrene, who remained in {NICKNAME}'s memory world, made a discovery...

t_ch: 真是的。居然聚集了这么多…小家伙们，是知道我会来吗？未免有些太热情了呀。
t_en: Geez. So many little ones gathered here... Did you know I was coming? You're being a bit too enthusiastic, aren't you?

t_ch: 幸好{NICKNAME}的气息没有变弱，感觉又靠近了几分……
t_en: Thankfully, {NICKNAME}'s presence hasn't weakened. I feel like I'm getting a bit closer...

t_ch: 咦，它们在守着什么…？
t_en: Huh? They're guarding something...

t_ch: {NICKNAME}的留影石机？怎么会在这儿？
t_en: Is that {NICKNAME}'s photostone? What's it doing here?

t_ch: 仔细一看，这些忆灵一动不动，像是被它吸引了……
t_en: Hmm. These memosprites are completely still. It's as if they're drawn to this thing...

t_ch: 这是……
t_en: This is a...

t_ch: 一只…更可爱的忆灵？
t_en: An... even cuter memosprite?

t_ch: 难怪留影石机装不下更多回忆，是因为你一直躲在里面吗？
t_en: No wonder the photostone can't store more memories... Have you been hiding in there all along?

t_ch: 找到…我……
t_en: Find... my...

t_ch: 旅途…伙伴……
t_en: Travel... companions...

t_ch: 这…怎么会……
t_en: What... How...

t_ch: 莫非……
t_en: Could that mean...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>{NICKNAME}…丹恒……</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>{NICKNAME}... Dan Heng...</color>

t_ch: 你是…「三月七」？
t_en: Are you... "March 7th"?

t_ch: 天空在燃烧，城中空无一人……
t_en: The sky is burning, and the streets are empty...

t_ch: 和当初一模一样。
t_en: It's just like how things were last time.

t_ch: 螺丝咕姆先生，你为我编写的密钥能坚持多久？
t_en: How long can the encryption key you wrote for me last, Mr. Screwllum?

t_ch: 「难以测算。逻辑：未知变数『三月小姐』的干涉方式尚不明朗。」
t_en: "That is difficult to project. Logic: It is currently unclear how the unknown variable 'Miss March' conducts her interference."

t_ch: 「请放心，在密钥失效前，我会及时将你抽离。」
t_en: "Please rest assured that I will extract you on time before the encryption key expires."

t_ch: 但那也意味着，我无法再以相同的方式骇入了。
t_en: But that means I will no longer be able to hack in via the same method.

t_ch: 机会只有一次。
t_en: I only have one chance.

t_ch: 「『记忆』的迷宫开始变化了。往后的路，我无法再担任你的向导。」
t_en: "The maze of the Remembrance is starting to change. I cannot remain your guide on your path forward."

t_ch: 「这也是为何，我们不得不与过去的敌人——」
t_en: "That is why we had to form a temporary alliance—"

t_ch: 「达成暂时的协议。」
t_en: "With our former enemy."

t_ch: 对您以身涉险的勇气，我表示由衷的敬意。
t_en: I express my utmost respect for your courage to personally face such dangers.

t_ch: 来古士……
t_en: Lygus...
